briefing_zh:
今天 AI 研究领域呈现出两大显著趋势：**交互式世界模型**和**Agent 工程基础设施**的同步爆发。**AlayaWorld** 和 **AlayaRenderer-Flash**（即 Generative World Renderer at the Speed of Play）共同构建了一套完整的视频世界模型栈——前者解决长时序一致性与交互性，后者将渲染速度推至实时可玩水准，代表着可控虚拟世界从实验室走向实际应用的关键突破。**ABot-World-0** 则证明了单卡桌面 GPU 即可支撑无限时序世界展开，大幅降低了交互世界模型的硬件门槛。

Agent 工程侧，**DataFlow-Harness** 提出 NL2Pipeline Gap 概念并用 MCP 层 + DAG 构建填补了编程 Agent 产出物无法持久化的缺口；**AgentDebugX** 则构建了 Detect-Attribute-Recover-Rerun 闭环调试框架，首次将多步 Agent 的根因定位问题系统化。这两项工作标志着 LLM Agent 从「能用」向「可维护、可调试」的工程化跨越。

在模型与基础设施层，**Gemini 3.6 Flash** 系列和 **Kimi K3** 在 Agentic 基准上的强劲表现持续压缩顶尖闭源与开源模型的差距；**LM Studio Bionic** 作为本地开源模型的 Agentic 运行时登场，进一步推动推理民主化。Hacker News 上 **Jack Dorsey 的 Buzz** 将团队协作、AI Agent 与 Git 托管合为一体，引发广泛讨论，预示着开发者工作流将被 Agent 深度重塑。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research landscape is dominated by two simultaneous surges: **interactive world models** and **agent engineering infrastructure**. **AlayaWorld** and **AlayaRenderer-Flash** (Generative World Renderer at the Speed of Play) together form a complete video world model stack — the former tackles long-horizon consistency and interactivity, while the latter pushes rendering to real-time playable speeds, marking a critical leap from laboratory demos to practical interactive environments. **ABot-World-0** further demonstrates that a single desktop GPU can sustain infinite-horizon world rollouts, dramatically lowering the hardware barrier for interactive world modeling.

On the agent engineering side, **DataFlow-Harness** coins the NL2Pipeline Gap and bridges it via an MCP layer plus persistent DAG construction; **AgentDebugX** introduces a Detect-Attribute-Recover-Rerun closed-loop debugging framework that systematically tackles multi-step agent root-cause diagnosis. Both works signal a maturation of LLM agents from 'it works' to 'maintainable and debuggable' engineering artifacts.

At the model and infrastructure layer, **Gemini 3.6 Flash** and **Kimi K3** continue to compress the gap between frontier closed-source and open models on agentic benchmarks. **LM Studio Bionic** emerges as a local agentic runtime for open models. Jack Dorsey's **Buzz** — merging team chat, AI agents, and Git hosting — triggered heated HN discussion, signaling that developer workflows are about to be deeply reshaped by agents.
viral_analysis_zh: 今天最可能出圈的是 **Gemini 3.6 Flash / 3.5 Flash 系列**（674分、516评论），Google 的多模型发布节奏配合 Cyber 能力噱头极易引发媒体跟进。紧随其后的是 **Jack Dorsey 的 Buzz**（304分），创始人效应 + 颠覆开发者工具的叙事天然具备病毒传播要素。论文侧，**AlayaWorld/AlayaRenderer** 双发联动，可玩交互世界模型的演示视频一旦流出，在 X/Twitter 上极有传播潜力。
viral_analysis_en: The most likely viral hit today is **Gemini 3.6 Flash / 3.5 Flash series** (674 pts, 516 comments) — Google's multi-model launch cadence plus 'Cyber' branding naturally drives media follow-up. Close behind is **Jack Dorsey's Buzz** (304 pts), where founder halo plus a disrupt-developer-tooling narrative carries inherent virality. On the paper side, the **AlayaWorld/AlayaRenderer** dual release — once demo videos of playable interactive world models surface — has strong X/Twitter viral potential.

huggingface_papers.title: Generative World Renderer at the Speed of Play
huggingface_papers.tldr: AlayaRenderer-Flash accelerates the original generative world renderer to real-time playable speeds. It receives structured world states from physics engines and synthesizes RGB frames without altering underlying world dynamics, offering an alternative path to interactive world modeling distinct from text/control-prompt-based generation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: AlayaRenderer-Flash 将生成式世界渲染器加速至可实时游玩速度。接收物理引擎导出的结构化世界状态并合成 RGB 帧，不改变底层世界动力学，为交互式世界建模提供区别于文本/控制提示生成的全新路径。

huggingface_papers.title: DataFlow-Harness: A Grounded Code-Agent Platform for Constructing Editable LLM Data Pipelines
huggingface_papers.tldr: DataFlow-Harness identifies and closes the 'NL2Pipeline Gap' — the disconnect between LLM agent-generated scripts and persistent platform artifacts. It guides agents to build native DAGs via typed incremental mutations using a DataFlow-Skills library and MCP protocol layer, making LLM-built data pipelines editable and reproducible.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: DataFlow-Harness 提出并解决「NL2Pipeline Gap」——LLM Agent 生成脚本与平台持久化制品间的断层。通过 DataFlow-Skills 库和 MCP 层引导 Agent 以类型化增量变更构建原生 DAG，让 LLM 构建的数据管道可编辑、可复现。

huggingface_papers.title: AlayaWorld: Interactive Long-Horizon World Modeling -- Full Technical Report
huggingface_papers.tldr: AlayaWorld generates customizable, explorable, continuously evolving virtual worlds from text, image, or video. It integrates real-time interaction, persistent spatiotemporal consistency, stable long-horizon generation, and efficient response — enabling video-game-like experiences without conventional asset pipelines.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: AlayaWorld 从文本、图像或视频生成可定制、可探索、持续演化的虚拟世界，集成交互性、持久时空一致性、稳定长时序生成和高效响应，无需传统游戏资产管线即可实现类游戏体验。

huggingface_papers.title: AgentDebugX: An Open-Source Toolkit for Failure Observability, Attribution, and Recovery in LLM Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: AgentDebugX addresses the core challenge that LLM agent failures surface at a different step than where they originate. Its Detect-Attribute-Recover-Rerun closed loop with DeepDebug performs multi-turn root-cause diagnosis through global trajectory understanding and structure-guided investigation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: AgentDebugX 专攻 LLM Agent 失败步骤与根因不一致的核心难题，构建 Detect-Attribute-Recover-Rerun 闭环框架，通过 DeepDebug 对全局轨迹和结构化路径进行多轮根因诊断，将观察直接转化为恢复动作。

huggingface_papers.title: ABot-World-0: Infinite Interactive World Rollout on a Single Desktop GPU
huggingface_papers.tldr: ABot-World-0 is an action-conditioned video world model for real-time, long-horizon closed-loop interaction running on a single desktop GPU. Multi-source training data spanning AAA games, simulation engines, and internet videos, with WorldExplorer agent-driven collection.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: ABot-World-0 是可在单张桌面 GPU 上运行的动作条件视频世界模型，支持实时长时序闭环交互，融合 AAA 游戏、仿真引擎和网络视频多源数据，以 WorldExplorer Agent 驱动数据采集。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Mage-Flow: An Efficient Native-Resolution Foundation Model for Image Generation and Editing
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Mage-Flow is a compact 4B-scale generative stack built from Mage-VAE (lightweight high-fidelity latent tokenizer) and a Native-Resolution Multimodal Diffusion Transformer, achieving frontier text-to-image generation and instruction-based editing quality at dramatically lower training and deployment cost.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Mage-Flow 是紧凑型 4B 规模生成栈，由 Mage-VAE 和原生分辨率多模态扩散 Transformer 构成，以大幅降低的训练和部署成本达到前沿文本到图像生成及指令编辑质量。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Text Template Tokens Are Implicit Semantic Registers in Diffusion Transformers
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Through causal interpretability analysis of large-scale DiTs, this work discovers that structural template tokens act as dominant image-to-text attention sinks, carrying semantically rich global image information despite being prompt-agnostic at the encoder output, revealing a previously unknown mechanism in diffusion model prompt-following.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 通过因果可解释性分析大规模扩散 Transformer，发现结构模板 token 在图到文注意力中充当主导汇聚点并携带丰富全局图像信息，揭示扩散模型遵循提示的此前未知机制。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Stale but Stable: Staleness-Adaptive Trust Regions for Stabilizing Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Asynchronous RL improves throughput by decoupling rollout from optimization but creates policy staleness that destabilizes training. This paper introduces staleness-adaptive trust region methods that dynamically adjust policy update boundaries based on measured lag, enabling stable training in large MoE and distributed RL settings where standard PPO clipping fails.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 异步 RL 通过解耦 rollout 与优化提升吞吐量，但产生策略滞后破坏训练稳定性。本文提出基于策略滞后度自适应信任域方法，在标准 PPO Clip 失效的大规模 MoE 和分布式 RL 场景下实现稳定训练。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Two-Level Meta-Rubrics for Evaluating Open-Ended Generation: GAMUT, a Benchmark for Factual Completeness
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: GAMUT addresses the underexplored recall side of factuality — whether responses contain all the information they should, not just whether claims are correct. Two-level meta-rubrics capture factual completeness across open-ended generation tasks, complementing existing precision-focused benchmarks.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: GAMUT 专注事实评估中被忽视的召回侧——回答是否包含所有应有信息，而非仅判断声明是否正确。两层元评分量表评估开放性生成的事实完整性，补充现有精确率导向基准。

alphaxiv_papers.title: SciForma: Structure-Faithful Generation of Scientific Diagrams
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: SciForma tackles scientific diagram generation where structural fidelity is conjunctive — any reversed arrow or unreadable equation invalidates the entire figure. It introduces constrained generation methods ensuring faithful rendering of components, directional relations, and textual annotations.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: SciForma 攻克科学图表生成的结构忠实性难题——正确性是合取性的，任何错误都使整图失效。引入约束生成方法确保组件、方向关系和文字标注的忠实渲染。

github_repos.name: PromptPartner/agentsmith
github_repos.tldr: AgentSmith is a universal, model-agnostic operating harness for AI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, etc.) with a lean core and plugin extensibility, abstracting provider-specific APIs so the same agent logic runs across any frontier model without changes.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AgentSmith 是通用、模型无关的 AI Agent 运行底座，兼容 Claude/Codex/Gemini 等多家模型，精简核心 + 插件扩展架构抽象提供商差异，让同一 Agent 逻辑无需修改即可跨模型运行。

github_repos.name: yc-duan/fastctx
github_repos.tldr: fastctx provides fast, context-efficient repository tools for AI agents via MCP, written in Rust. It gives agents optimized access to codebases without flooding context windows with irrelevant file content.
github_repos.tldr_zh: fastctx 通过 MCP 为 AI Agent 提供快速、上下文高效的仓库工具，Rust 实现，让 Agent 以最小上下文消耗获取代码库关键信息。

github_repos.name: Kritt-ai/open-kritt
github_repos.tldr: open-kritt orchestrates AI agents to automatically find real vulnerabilities in code, applying multi-agent collaboration to security analysis for scalable automated code auditing at expert depth.
github_repos.tldr_zh: open-kritt 编排多 AI Agent 自动发现代码真实漏洞，将多 Agent 协作应用于安全分析，实现专家深度的规模化自动化代码审计。

github_repos.name: KlaatAI/klaatcode
github_repos.tldr: klaatcode is an open-source terminal AI coding agent claiming Claude Code-grade accuracy with smart model routing, positioning itself as a fully open alternative to proprietary coding agents.
github_repos.tldr_zh: klaatcode 是声称达到 Claude Code 级精度的开源终端 AI 编程 Agent，通过智能模型路由实现高质量代码生成，是专有编程 Agent 的完全开源替代。

github_repos.name: MemTensor/memmy-agent
github_repos.tldr: memmy-agent provides a single shared memory layer across multiple AI systems — enabling persistent cross-agent and cross-session state, addressing a core limitation of stateless LLM interactions.
github_repos.tldr_zh: memmy-agent 为多个 AI 系统提供统一共享记忆层，支持跨 Agent、跨会话持久化状态，解决无状态 LLM 交互的核心局限。

hackernews.title: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
hackernews.tldr: Google launches three new Gemini models simultaneously: 3.6 Flash (frontier speed-quality balance), 3.5 Flash-Lite (ultra-low cost), and 3.5 Flash Cyber (cybersecurity-specialized), saturating every price-performance tier while adding vertical specialists.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Google 同步发布三款 Gemini 新模型：3.6 Flash（前沿速度-质量平衡）、3.5 Flash-Lite（超低成本）和 3.5 Flash Cyber（网络安全专项），覆盖各价格性能层级并添加垂直专项。

hackernews.title: Kimi K3 Is Competitive with Fable; Kimi K3 and Fable Is SoTA
hackernews.tldr: Kimi K3 achieves competitive performance with Fable on the AA-Briefcase agentic benchmark, signaling that the frontier is no longer dominated solely by GPT/Claude — open-weight and Chinese lab models are now genuinely competitive for agentic tasks.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Kimi K3 在 AA-Briefcase Agentic 基准上与 Fable 旗鼓相当，标志着前沿 Agentic 能力不再由 GPT/Claude 独占，开放权重和中国实验室模型已真正具备竞争力。

hackernews.title: LM Studio Bionic: the AI agent for open models
hackernews.tldr: LM Studio Bionic is a new agentic runtime for local open models, enabling tool use, multi-step reasoning, and task execution on-device without cloud APIs, bringing agentic capabilities to the open-weight ecosystem.
hackernews.tldr_zh: LM Studio Bionic 是本地开源模型的新 Agentic 运行时，无需云端 API 即可在设备端实现工具调用、多步推理和任务执行，为开放权重生态系统带来 Agentic 能力。

hackernews.title: Jack Dorsey launches Buzz to combine team chat, AI agents and Git hosting
hackernews.tldr: Jack Dorsey's Buzz integrates team communication, AI agent orchestration, and Git repository hosting into a single platform where agents operate as first-class collaborators within developer workflows — not bolted-on assistants.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Jack Dorsey 的 Buzz 将团队通讯、AI Agent 编排与 Git 代码托管整合为单一平台，Agent 作为开发者工作流中的一等协作者而非附加助手，从根本上重塑软件团队协作方式。

hackernews.title: VulnHunter: Capital One's agentic AI code security tool
hackernews.tldr: Capital One open-sources VulnHunter, an agentic AI system for enterprise-scale code vulnerability discovery. A major financial institution's production deployment validates agentic AI for high-stakes security use cases.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Capital One 开源 VulnHunter——企业级 Agentic AI 代码漏洞发现系统。主要金融机构的生产部署验证了 Agentic AI 在高风险安全场景的可行性。
